raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Assembly Bill 860 requires every registered voter in California to be mailed a ballot for the 2020 General Election.",
    "There is a concern that a surge in coronavirus cases could occur in the fall.",
    "Mailing every California voter a ballot is essential to ensuring that elections are conducted safely.",
    "Approximately 78% of California’s registered voters received a ballot in the mail before the March Primary.",
    "At least 16 states either postponed their primary elections or switched to vote by mail elections due to COVID-19.",
    "States that have conducted elections during the spread of COVID-19 have reported increases in voters seeking to vote by mail.",
    "In-person voting opportunities will remain available in a manner that protects public health.",
    "Governor Gavin Newsom issued an executive order requiring that all voters be mailed a ballot for the November election."
  ]
}
```
